title: Fitness API
description: RESTful Fitness Data Management API. The server features secure JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, and seamless data management for user fitness metrics. Built with an Express.js backend and integrated with MongoDB via Mongoose for structured, cross-origin data access.
details: The server features secure JWT authentication, bcrypt password hashing, and seamless data management for user fitness metrics. Built with an Express.js backend and integrated with MongoDB via Mongoose for structured, cross-origin data access.

title: Fitness APP
description: MEVN Fitness Client-Side Platform. A responsive client-side web application built with Vue 3, Vite, and Bootstrap 5. The platform leverages Vue Router for seamless client-side navigation, allowing users to securely log in, register, and manage their fitness journeys interactively.
details: A responsive client-side web application built with Vue 3, Vite, and Bootstrap 5. The platform leverages Vue Router for seamless client-side navigation, allowing users to securely log in, register, and manage their fitness journeys interactively.

title: Course Booking API
description: Type-Safe Modular Backend Service. A TypeScript-first Express.js API designed with a service-layer architecture, endpoint-based routing, JWT authentication, and RBAC middleware. Features rigorous end-to-end data validation utilizing Zod, OpenAPI, and Jest integration testing.
details: A TypeScript-first Express.js API designed with a service-layer architecture, endpoint-based routing, JWT authentication, and RBAC middleware. Features rigorous end-to-end data validation utilizing Zod, OpenAPI, and Jest integration testing.

title: Course Booking App
description: Monorepo Course Enrollment Platform. A dynamic Vue.js frontend engineered within a high-performance Turborepo monorepo structure. Utilizes Pinia for state management and TailwindCSS for responsive styling, enforcing shared schema contracts for type-safe frontend-backend synchronization.
details: A dynamic Vue.js frontend engineered within a high-performance Turborepo monorepo structure. Utilizes Pinia for state management and TailwindCSS for responsive styling, enforcing shared schema contracts via Zod for type-safe frontend-backend synchronization.
